title: Worker-side (CPS)
body: Usual hours, adjacent-month transitions, and coarse movement across the frozen AI-relevance groups in public monthly files.

title: Business-side (BTOS)
body: National AI-use trends and supplement workforce-effect rows; experimental but direct for business-reported adoption.

title: Structure and macro (OEWS / O*NET / JOLTS / CES)
body: Occupational employment and tasks; sector flows and payroll index. Contextual, not worker-firm linked.

title: Missing integrated object
body: No core public source jointly identifies worker occupation, employer AI adoption, and subsequent worker outcomes.

title: CPS: short AI-at-work module
body: Marginal addition on how AI is used on the job without over-claiming measurement quality.

title: BTOS continuity plus ABS complement
body: Keep business series comparable; use ABS as annual structural business-side anchor.

title: JOLTS: coarse occupation-aware pilot
body: Narrow demand context that does not assume fine occupation resolution in core JOLTS.

title: Linked administrative microdata
body: Long-run horizon: restricted-use linkage for integrated worker-firm observation outside the public stack.
